info.title: Sobo Storeman
info.description: AWS S3 storage manager API. All /aws/s3/* routes require a Bearer JWT token obtained from POST /aws/login.

post.summary: Authenticate with AWS credentials and receive a JWT token
post.description: Validates the supplied AWS credentials by performing a lightweight ListBuckets call. On success, returns a JWT token that encodes the credentials (encrypted). This token must be passed as a Bearer token in the Authorization header for all /aws/s3/* routes.

419.description: AWS credentials or STS token have expired

200.description: List of buckets owned by the authenticated AWS account

delete.description: Deletes the named S3 bucket. The bucket must be empty before it can be deleted.

post.summary: Copy an object between buckets or within a bucket
Upload an object to S3 from a server-side file path
post.description: Reads the file at the given server-side path and uploads it to the specified bucket/key.

post.summary: Upload an object to S3 from a base64-encoded body
post.description: Accepts a base64-encoded file body and uploads the decoded bytes to the specified bucket/key.

post.summary: Upload an object to S3 from a FORM body
post.description: Accepts a form body and uploads the decoded bytes to the specified bucket/key.

delete.summary: Delete a single object from S3
delete.description: Deletes the object and returns the updated list of objects remaining in the bucket.

200.description: Object deleted; returns updated bucket object listing

delete.summary: Delete multiple objects from a bucket in one call
delete.description: Deletes all listed object keys and returns the updated bucket object listing.

200.description: Objects deleted; returns updated bucket object listing

get.summary: Playground endpoint — returns extended debug/test data

200.description: Playground data including PHP version and a sample AwsCredentials object

access_key_id.description: AWS Access Key ID (also accepted as access_key)

secret_access_key.description: AWS Secret Access Key (also accepted as secret_key)

session_token.description: Optional STS session token — only for temporary credentials

expires.description: Optional credential expiry — ISO 8601 date/time or Unix timestamp

jwt_token.description: Bearer token to use in Authorization header for all protected routes

ObjectInfoShort.description: Object metadata as returned by ListObjectsV2

ObjectGetResult.description: Full object metadata and body returned by GetObject

UnprocessableEntity.description: Missing or invalid request body field

bearerAuth.description: JWT token obtained from POST /aws/login. Contains encrypted AWS credentials.
